src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/a.general_idea: Move complex setup logic (npmrc path handling, profile creation, configuration building) from the API layer to the ConfigurationService.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/m.general_idea: Implement Serializable to allow the record instance to be serialized, likely for caching or session storage.
Add Spring AOT reflective hint to ensure the class is accessible via reflection in native image builds.
Remove Lombok's Jacksonized annotation, likely because standard Jackson serialization is sufficient or handled differently.
Add an 'active' boolean field to the record to track the profile's activation state.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Rename the configuration model class from Configuration to NpmrcmConfiguration to improve namespace clarity.
Add Lombok's @NonNull annotation to enforce non-null constraints on the save method parameter.
Introduce a new setup method to the service interface for initialization logic.
Remove getConfigLocation and getProfilesLocation methods as they are no longer part of the public API.
Delegate filesystem operations to a dedicated FilesystemHelper service to reduce boilerplate and improve testability.

src/main/java/com/cps/cli/npmrcmanager/s.general_idea: Implement the setup method to initialize the configuration by prompting the user for the npmrc path.
